heading: A senior-led SEO team in Toronto
intro: Alpha Digital Solutions is a senior-led, white-hat SEO agency based in Toronto. We tailor our process to each client's goals — results over hype, with every change pre-approved and every step documented. NDA-ready, 30-day rolling, no lock-in.

members.name: Strategy & technical SEO
members.bio: Runs the forensic audit and the technical roadmap — crawlability, indexation, schema, performance and migration safety — and is your senior point of contact from day one.

members.name: Content & on-page
members.bio: Owns topical mapping, SME-led briefs and on-page optimisation — pages engineered to rank for the search engine and convert the human reading them.

members.name: Authority & digital PR
members.bio: Leads outreach, linkable-asset production and data-led digital PR — every placement editorial, every link earned and defensible. No PBNs, no shortcuts.

members.name: Local & community
members.bio: Handles Google Business Profiles, citations and review velocity, plus authentic Reddit and community presence and Answer Engine Optimisation for AI citations.
